description_long: This is a large, industrial outdoor control cabinet, typically used for housing electrical or power distribution equipment. The cabinet is constructed from metal, with a weathered, greenish finish and visible rust patches, indicating prolonged exposure to the elements. The front features a prominent 'DANGER HIGH VOLTAGE KEEP OUT' warning sign, a yellow electrical hazard symbol, and several small control switches or indicators, as well as a pair of horizontal ventilation grilles. The sides and back are mostly plain, with additional rust and two vertical ventilation grilles on one side. The cabinet is robust and boxy, with a flat top that could support small objects. Its design is utilitarian, prioritizing safety and durability for urban or industrial environments.
description: A large, weathered metal control cabinet with warning signs, ventilation grilles, and rust patches, designed for outdoor electrical or power distribution use.
description_view_0: The front view shows the main access door with a large warning sign, electrical hazard symbol, control switches, and two horizontal ventilation grilles.
description_view_1: The left side view displays two vertical ventilation grilles and visible rust, with no signage or controls.
description_view_2: The back view is plain, showing only the weathered, rusted metal surface with no grilles, signs, or controls.
description_view_3: The right side view is featureless except for rust patches, lacking any grilles, signage, or controls.
